---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2024-05-23"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, cache = TRUE)

library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(tidyverse)
```

### Import DRM data
```{r import_drm}
# Import DRM data
df0 <- read_csv("data/drm/export.csv") %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), as_factor),
         Date = as_date(as.character(Date), format = "%m/%d/%Y"))

# Get day of the year number, week, and month for some model fitting
df0 <- df0 %>%
  mutate(Day = yday(Date),
         Week = week(Date),
         Week2 = factor(cut(Week, breaks = seq(0,52,2))),
         Week = factor(Week),
         Month = factor(month(Date)),
         year = factor(year(Date)))

```

```{r}
# Aggregate Subregions which changed over time...
df <- df0 %>%
  mutate(Subregion = case_when(Subregion %in% c("Broward", "Broward-Miami") ~ "Broward-Miami",
                               Subregion %in% c("Deerfield", "Palm Beach",
                                                "South Palm Beach", "North Palm Beach") ~ "Palm Beach",
                               Subregion %in% c("Marquesas", "Marquesas-Tortugas Trans") ~ "Marquesas",
                               Subregion %in% c("Tortugas--Tortugas Bank", 
                                                "Tortugas--Dry Tortugas NP") ~ "Tortugas",
                               Subregion %in% c("Mid-Upper Keys Transition") ~ "Middle Keys",
                               TRUE ~ Subregion))


# Aggregate Agaricia spp. other than AAGA, Mycetophyllia spp., Isophyllia spp., Oculina spp., Solenastrea spp., Scolymia spp.
df <- df %>%
  mutate(Species = case_when(Species %in% c("AFRA", "AGAR", "AGRA", "AHUM", "ALAM") ~ "AGAR",
                             Species %in% c("MALI", "MLAM", "MYCE", "MFER") ~ "MYCE",  #, "MFER"
                             Species %in% c("IRIG", "ISIN", "ISOP") ~ "ISOP",
                             Species %in% c("OCUL", "ODIF") ~ "OCUL",
                             Species %in% c("SHYA", "SBOU") ~ "SOLE",
                             Species %in% c("SCOL", "SCUB", "SLAC", "SWEL") ~ "SCOL",
                             Species %in% c("OFAV", "OANN", "OFRA") ~ "ORBI",
                             TRUE ~ Species)) %>%
  drop_na(Species)


spp_to_include <- df %>%
  count(Species, year) %>%
  complete(Species, year, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  dplyr::filter(min(n) >= 10)  # 20 is a good cutoff


```

# Changes in density of each species over time
```{r}
# dens <- df %>%
#   # Count number of colonies of each species per transect
#   count(year, Species, Site, Transect, Subregion) %>%
#   # Add zeros for all species not counted on a transect
#   complete(Species, nesting(year, Site, Transect, Subregion), fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
#   # SUBSET FOR FASTER MODELING
#   filter(Species %in% spp_to_include$Species)
# 
# mod_1 <- glmer(n ~ Species * year + (1|Subregion), data = dens, family = "poisson",
#                verbose = TRUE, nAGQ=0, control=glmerControl(optimizer = "nloptwrap")) 
# anova(mod_1)
# 
# res <- emmeans(mod_1, specs = c("Species", "year"), type = "response")
# 
# as.tibble(res) %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x = year, y = rate)) +
#   geom_point() + #aes(color = Subregion)
#   geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = rate - SE, ymax = rate + SE)) +
#   geom_line(aes(group = 1)) + #aes(group = Subregion, color = Subregion
#   facet_wrap(~Species, scales = "free_y") +
#   geom_vline(aes(xintercept = "2014")) +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
# 
# densres <- res
# saveRDS(densres, file = "processed/density.rds")
```



# Change in density 2014-2023 for each Species
```{r}
# Model change in density from 2014-2023 for each species
dens <- df %>%
  filter(year %in% c("2014", "2023")) %>%
  mutate(year = factor(year, levels = c("2023", "2014"))) %>%
  # Count number of colonies of each species per transect
  count(year, Species, Site, Transect, Subregion) %>%
  # Add zeros for all species not counted on a transect
  complete(Species, nesting(year, Site, Transect, Subregion), fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  # SUBSET FOR FASTER MODELING
  group_by(Species, year) %>%
  filter(sum(n) >= 40) %>%
  ungroup()

mod5 <- glmer(n ~ Species * year + (1|Species:Subregion), data = dens, family = "poisson",
              verbose = TRUE, nAGQ=0, control=glmerControl(optimizer = "nloptwrap")) 
anova(mod5)


diffs <- rbind(pairs(emmeans(mod5, specs = c("Species", "year")), by = "Species", level = 0.95))

saveRDS(diffs, file = "data/processed/dens20142023.rds")
```


```{r}
dens2 <- df %>%
  # Count number of colonies of each species per transect
  count(year, Species, Site, Transect, Subregion) %>%
  # Add zeros for all species not counted on a transect
  complete(Species, nesting(year, Site, Transect, Subregion), fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  # SUBSET FOR FASTER MODELING
  group_by(Species, year) %>%
  filter(sum(n) >= 40) %>%
  ungroup()

mod6 <- glmer(n ~ Species * year + (1|Species:Subregion), data = dens2, family = "poisson",
              verbose = TRUE, nAGQ=0, control=glmerControl(optimizer = "nloptwrap")) 

res<-emmeans(mod6, specs = c("Species", "year"), type = "response") %>%
  as_tibble()
ggplot(res, aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(year)), y = rate)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = year %in% c("2014", "2023"))) +
  facet_wrap(~Species, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "red")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess")

res2<-emmeans(mod6, specs = c("Species", "year")) %>%
  as_tibble()
ggplot(res2, aes(x = as.numeric(as.character(year)), y = emmean)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = year %in% c("2014", "2023"))) +
  facet_wrap(~Species, scales = "free") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "red")) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess")


```

# Smooth density change
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(mgcv)

dens2_gam <- dens2 %>%
  mutate(
    year_num = as.numeric(as.character(year)),
    Species  = factor(Species),
    Subregion = factor(Subregion),
    sp_sub   = factor(interaction(Species, Subregion, drop = TRUE))
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(year_num), !is.na(n)) %>%
  droplevels()
stopifnot(is.factor(dens2_gam$Species))
stopifnot(is.factor(dens2_gam$sp_sub))

k_try <- c(4, 5, 6, 7, 8)

fits <- lapply(k_try, function(k) {
  bam(
    n ~
      s(year_num, Species, bs = "fs", k = k, m = 2) +  # species-specific smooths, shared penalty
      s(sp_sub, bs = "re"),                            # random intercept for Species:Subregion
    data   = dens2_gam,
    family = poisson(link = "log"),
    method = "fREML"
  )
})
names(fits) <- paste0("k", k_try)

aic_tab <- tibble(k = k_try, AIC = sapply(fits, AIC)) %>% arrange(AIC)
aic_tab

# Start with the best AIC fit, then consider stepping down to the smallest acceptable k
best_name <- names(fits)[which.min(sapply(fits, AIC))]
mod_smooth <- fits[[best_name]]

best_name
gam.check(mod_smooth)   # look at k-index and residual diagnostics


# Helper: compute 2014->2023 change with SE using lpmatrix + vcov
estimate_change_2014_2023 <- function(mod, data_ref,
                                      year_from = 2014, year_to = 2023,
                                      level = 0.95) {

  # Grab factor levels from the data used to fit the model
  sp_levels    <- levels(data_ref$Species)
  sp_sub_level <- levels(data_ref$sp_sub)[1]  # any valid level is fine

  # Prediction grid (must include ALL model vars with non-NA values)
  nd <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    Species  = factor(sp_levels, levels = sp_levels),
    year_num = c(year_from, year_to),
    sp_sub   = factor(sp_sub_level, levels = levels(data_ref$sp_sub))
  )

  # Exclude the random-effect smooth by its exact label
  # (this is usually "s(sp_sub)" but we’ll be robust)
  sm_labs <- sapply(mod$smooth, `[[`, "label")
  excl <- sm_labs[grepl("sp_sub", sm_labs)]  # find the smooth involving sp_sub

  X <- predict(mod, newdata = nd, type = "lpmatrix", exclude = excl)

  V <- vcov(mod)

  i_from <- which(nd$year_num == year_from)
  i_to   <- which(nd$year_num == year_to)

  stopifnot(all(nd$Species[i_from] == nd$Species[i_to]))

  Xd <- X[i_to, , drop = FALSE] - X[i_from, , drop = FALSE]

  log_ratio <- as.numeric(Xd %*% coef(mod))
  se        <- sqrt(rowSums((Xd %*% V) * Xd))

  z <- qnorm(1 - (1 - level)/2)

  tibble::tibble(
    Species   = nd$Species[i_to],
    year_from = year_from,
    year_to   = year_to,
    log_ratio = log_ratio,
    se        = se,
    lo_log    = log_ratio - z * se,
    hi_log    = log_ratio + z * se,
    ratio     = exp(log_ratio),
    lo_ratio  = exp(lo_log),
    hi_ratio  = exp(hi_log),
    pct       = (ratio - 1) * 100,
    lo_pct    = (lo_ratio - 1) * 100,
    hi_pct    = (hi_ratio - 1) * 100
  )
}

chg_smooth <- estimate_change_2014_2023(
  mod      = mod_smooth,
  data_ref = dens2_gam,
  year_from = 2014,
  year_to   = 2023,
  level     = 0.95
)
chg_smooth

chg_smooth
```

# Plot

```{r}
## ============================================================
## Population-average GAM trajectories (exclude sp_sub) +
## raw observed points + population-average fitted points +
## annotations:
##   BLACK: 2-year GLMM %Δ (2014→2023)
##   BLUE:  population-average GAM %Δ (2014→2023)
##
## Requires objects already in memory:
##   df, dens2_gam (with n, Species, Subregion, year_num, sp_sub), mod_smooth
## ============================================================

## ---- 1) Raw observed points (Species x Year means) ----
dens_plot <- dens2_gam |>
  dplyr::group_by(Species, year_num) |>
  dplyr::summarize(n_obs = mean(n, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  dplyr::mutate(highlight = year_num %in% c(2014, 2023))

## ---- 2) BLACK %: your original 2-year GLMM (2014 & 2023 only) ----
dens_2yr <- df |>
  dplyr::filter(year %in% c("2014", "2023")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(year = factor(year, levels = c("2023", "2014"))) |>
  dplyr::count(year, Species, Site, Transect, Subregion, name = "n") |>
  tidyr::complete(Species, tidyr::nesting(year, Site, Transect, Subregion), fill = list(n = 0)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(Species, year) |>
  dplyr::filter(sum(n, na.rm = TRUE) >= 40) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species   = factor(Species),
    Subregion = factor(Subregion),
    sp_sub    = factor(interaction(Species, Subregion, drop = TRUE))
  )

mod5 <- lme4::glmer(
  n ~ Species * year + (1 | sp_sub),
  data = dens_2yr,
  family = poisson,
  verbose = TRUE,
  nAGQ = 0,
  control = lme4::glmerControl(optimizer = "nloptwrap")
)

emm5   <- emmeans::emmeans(mod5, specs = c("Species", "year"), type = "response")
diffs5 <- pairs(emm5, by = "Species", reverse = FALSE)  # ratio = 2023/2014

pct_black <- as.data.frame(diffs5) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = levels(dens2_gam$Species)),
    pct_2yr = (ratio - 1) * 100
  )

## ---- 3) Population-average GAM predictions (exclude sp_sub) ----
# identify and exclude the random-effect smooth(s) involving sp_sub
sm_labs <- vapply(mod_smooth$smooth, \(s) s$label, character(1))
excl <- sm_labs[grepl("sp_sub", sm_labs)]

# Smooth curve grid
year_grid <- seq(min(dens2_gam$year_num, na.rm = TRUE), max(dens2_gam$year_num, na.rm = TRUE), by = 1)

pred_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  Species  = levels(dens2_gam$Species),
  year_num = year_grid,
  sp_sub   = factor(levels(dens2_gam$sp_sub)[1], levels = levels(dens2_gam$sp_sub))
)

pred_grid$fit <- as.numeric(predict(
  mod_smooth,
  newdata = pred_grid,
  type = "response",
  exclude = excl,
  block.size = 5000
))

# Population-average fitted points at the observed years (so line has matching points)
fit_pts <- dens_plot %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    Species,
    year_num,
    sp_sub = factor(levels(dens2_gam$sp_sub)[1], levels = levels(dens2_gam$sp_sub))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(fit_pop = as.numeric(predict(
    mod_smooth,
    newdata = .,
    type = "response",
    exclude = excl,
    block.size = 5000
  )))

## ---- 4) BLUE %: population-average GAM %Δ using pop-average fitted values (matches CSV estimand) ----
pct_blue <- pred_grid %>%
  dplyr::filter(year_num %in% c(2014, 2023)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, year_num, fit) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = year_num, values_from = fit, names_prefix = "y") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(pct_smooth = 100 * (y2023 / y2014 - 1)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, pct_smooth)

## ---- 5) Annotation positions ----
ann_pos <- dens_plot |>
  dplyr::group_by(Species) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    x = min(year_num, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.5,
    y = max(n_obs, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    y_black = y * 0.92,
    y_blue  = y * 0.78
  )

ann_black <- ann_pos |>
  dplyr::left_join(pct_black, by = "Species") |>
  dplyr::mutate(label_black = ifelse(is.na(pct_2yr), NA_character_, sprintf("%+.0f%%", pct_2yr)))

ann_blue <- ann_pos |>
  dplyr::left_join(pct_blue, by = "Species") |>
  dplyr::mutate(label_blue = ifelse(is.na(pct_smooth), NA_character_, sprintf("%+.0f%%", pct_smooth)))

## ---- 6) Plot ----
p <- ggplot2::ggplot() +

  # population-average smooth curve
  ggplot2::geom_line(
    data = pred_grid,
    ggplot2::aes(x = year_num, y = fit, group = Species),
    linewidth = 0.9,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +

  # population-average fitted points (blue) at observed years
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = fit_pts,
    ggplot2::aes(x = year_num, y = fit_pop),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 1.2
  ) +

  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = c(2014, 2023), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.3) +
  ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 16, `TRUE` = 21)) +
  ggplot2::scale_alpha_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 0.35, `TRUE` = 1)) +

  # annotations
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = ann_black,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y_black, label = label_black),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    size = 2.7,
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = ann_blue,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y_blue, label = label_blue),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "#1f78b4",
    size = 2.7,
    hjust = 0
  ) +

  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~Species, scales = "free_y") +
  ggplot2::theme_classic() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Density",
    title = "Population-average density trajectories\nBlack: 2-year GLMM %Δ (2014→2023)   Blue: population-average GAM %Δ (2014→2023)"
  )

p
```

# save smoothed changes
```{r}

# prediction grid
nd <- expand_grid(
  Species  = levels(dens2_gam$Species),
  year_num = c(2014, 2023),
  sp_sub   = factor(levels(dens2_gam$sp_sub)[1],
                    levels = levels(dens2_gam$sp_sub))
)

# exclude the Species:Subregion random effect
sm_labs <- sapply(mod_smooth$smooth, `[[`, "label")
excl <- sm_labs[grepl("sp_sub", sm_labs)]

# design matrix
X <- predict(mod_smooth, newdata = nd, type = "lpmatrix", exclude = excl)

# covariance matrix
V <- vcov(mod_smooth)

# rows for years
i14 <- which(nd$year_num == 2014)
i23 <- which(nd$year_num == 2023)

# difference rows (2023 − 2014)
Xd <- X[i23, ] - X[i14, ]

# estimates and SE
est <- as.numeric(Xd %*% coef(mod_smooth))
se  <- sqrt(rowSums((Xd %*% V) * Xd))

# test statistics
z  <- est / se
p  <- 2 * pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE)

# assemble output
densdiffs_smooth <- tibble(
  Species  = nd$Species[i23],
  contrast = "2023 - 2014",
  estimate = est,
  SE       = se,
  df       = Inf,
  z.ratio  = z,
  p.value  = p
)

# write CSV
write.csv(densdiffs_smooth,
          "data/processed/densdiffs_smooth.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

# workingVVV
```{r}
## ============================================================
## Discrete year-specific population averages (GLMM with year as factor)
## plotted as BLACK points, plus population-average GAM smooth (BLUE curve),
## with %Δ 2014→2023 from:
##   - BLACK text: discrete GLMM (2014 vs 2023 only)
##   - BLUE  text: population-average GAM smooth (2014 vs 2023)
##
## Uses packages you already have loaded/available: dplyr, tidyr, lme4, emmeans, ggplot2
##
## Requires:
##   df         = raw data with year, Species, Site, Transect, Subregion
##   dens2_gam  = data used to fit mod_smooth, with year_num, Species (factor), sp_sub (factor)
##   mod_smooth = mgcv::bam fit previously (the GAM time-series model)
## ============================================================

## ---- 1) Build dens2 and fit discrete-year GLMM (population averages) ----
dens2 <- df %>%
  dplyr::count(year, Species, Site, Transect, Subregion, name = "n") %>%
  tidyr::complete(Species, tidyr::nesting(year, Site, Transect, Subregion), fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species, year) %>%
  dplyr::filter(sum(n, na.rm = TRUE) >= 40) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    year     = factor(year),                 # discrete factor years
    Species  = factor(Species),
    Subregion = factor(Subregion),
    sp_sub   = interaction(Species, Subregion, drop = TRUE) |> factor()
  )

mod6 <- lme4::glmer(
  n ~ Species * year + (1 | sp_sub),
  data = dens2,
  family = poisson,
  verbose = TRUE,
  nAGQ = 0,
  control = lme4::glmerControl(optimizer = "nloptwrap")
)

## ---- 2) GLMM fitted (population-average) values for each Species×Year ----
# type="response" gives mean on count scale; emmeans for glmer is population-level by default
emm_year <- emmeans::emmeans(mod6, specs = c("Species", "year"), type = "response")
res_year <- tibble::as_tibble(emm_year) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    year_chr = as.character(year),
    year_num = as.numeric(year_chr),
    highlight = year_chr %in% c("2014", "2023")
  )

## ============================================================
## BLUE curve as a smooth of the BLACK year-factor population means
## (i.e., smooth the emmeans "rate" directly, on the response scale)
## ============================================================

## res_year already created earlier from:
## emm_year <- emmeans(mod6, specs=c("Species","year"), type="response")
## res_year <- as_tibble(emm_year) with year_num, rate, SE (or asymp.SE) etc.

# Ensure numeric year and pick the right SE column name returned by emmeans
res_year2 <- res_year %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    year_chr = as.character(year),
    year_num = as.numeric(year_chr)
  )

# emmeans sometimes uses "SE" or "asymp.SE" on response scale objects
se_col <- dplyr::case_when(
  "SE" %in% names(res_year2) ~ "SE",
  "asymp.SE" %in% names(res_year2) ~ "asymp.SE",
  TRUE ~ NA_character_
)

if (is.na(se_col)) stop("Could not find SE column in res_year (expected SE or asymp.SE).")

res_year2 <- res_year2 %>%
  dplyr::rename(se_rate = dplyr::all_of(se_col)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    w = 1 / (se_rate^2),
    w = ifelse(is.finite(w) & w > 0, w, NA_real_)
  )

# Fit a GAM on the RESPONSE SCALE to the black points:
# - family = gaussian() because we're smoothing estimated means, not raw counts
# - species-specific smooths: s(year_num, Species, bs="fs")
# - weights: inverse-variance weighting from emmeans SEs
k_blue <- 10  # tweak if you want more/less wiggle; this is usually plenty for annual series

mod_blue <- mgcv::bam(
  rate ~ s(year_num, Species, bs = "fs", k = 7, m = 2),
  data    = res_year2,
  family  = "gaussian",
  #weights = w,
  method  = "fREML"
)

# Prediction grid (same years for nice smooth curve)
year_grid <- seq(min(res_year2$year_num, na.rm = TRUE), max(res_year2$year_num, na.rm = TRUE), by = 1)

pred_blue <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  Species  = levels(res_year2$Species),
  year_num = year_grid
)

pred_blue$fit <- as.numeric(predict(mod_blue, newdata = pred_blue, type = "response"))

# BLUE %Δ from 2014 to 2023 on this response-scale smooth
pct_blue2 <- pred_blue %>%
  dplyr::filter(year_num %in% c(2014, 2023)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, year_num, fit) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = year_num, values_from = fit, names_prefix = "y") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(pct_smooth = 100 * (y2023 / y2014 - 1)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, pct_smooth)

# BLACK %Δ remains from your discrete-year GLMM (res_2014_2023 / pct_black)
# We'll assume you already computed:
#   res_2014_2023: Species, pct_2yr
# If not, re-create quickly from res_year2:
res_2014_2023 <- res_year2 %>%
  dplyr::filter(year_chr %in% c("2014","2023")) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, year_chr, rate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = year_chr, values_from = rate, names_prefix = "y") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(pct_2yr = 100 * (y2023 / y2014 - 1)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, pct_2yr)

# Annotation positions from black points
ann_pos <- res_year2 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    x = min(year_num, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.5,
    y = max(rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    pred_blue %>% dplyr::group_by(Species) %>% dplyr::summarize(y_fit = max(fit, na.rm = TRUE), .groups="drop"),
    by = "Species"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    y = pmax(y, y_fit, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_black = y * 0.92,
    y_blue  = y * 0.78
  )

ann_black <- ann_pos %>%
  dplyr::left_join(res_2014_2023, by = "Species") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(label_black = ifelse(is.na(pct_2yr), NA_character_, sprintf("%+.0f%%", pct_2yr)))

ann_blue <- ann_pos %>%
  dplyr::left_join(pct_blue2, by = "Species") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(label_blue = ifelse(is.na(pct_smooth), NA_character_, sprintf("%+.0f%%", pct_smooth)))

# Plot: black points (discrete-year GLMM means) + blue response-scale smooth of those means
p <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
  ggplot2::geom_line(
    data = pred_blue,
    ggplot2::aes(x = year_num, y = fit, group = Species),
    linewidth = 0.9,
    alpha = 0.95,
    color = "#1f78b4"
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = res_year2,
    ggplot2::aes(x = year_num, y = rate),
    color = "black",
    size = 1.8
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = c(2014, 2023), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.25) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = ann_black,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y_black, label = label_black),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    size = 2.7,
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = ann_blue,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y_blue, label = label_blue),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "#1f78b4",
    size = 2.7,
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~Species, scales = "free_y") +
  ggplot2::theme_classic() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Population-average fitted density",
    title = "Population-average density trajectories\nBlack points: discrete-year GLMM fitted means   Blue curve: response-scale smooth of those means\nBlack text: GLMM %Δ (2014→2023)   Blue text: smoothed %Δ (2014→2023)"
  )

p

## ============================================================
## Write densdiffs_smoth.csv with 2014→2023 changes per Species:
##  - discrete-year GLMM comparison (2014 vs 2023 only, from mod6 emmeans "rate")
##  - smooth-fit comparison (2014 vs 2023, from mod_blue response-scale smooth of those means)
##
## Output columns:
##   Species, contrast,
##   estimate_discrete, pct_discrete,
##   estimate_smooth,   pct_smooth
##
## Assumes you already have in memory from previous steps:
##   res_year2  (Species, year_chr/year_num, rate, se_rate, w, etc. from emmeans(mod6))
##   pred_blue  (Species, year_num, fit from predict(mod_blue))
## ============================================================

# 1) Discrete 2014 vs 2023 from GLMM fitted means (rate)
disc_14_23 <- res_year2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(year_chr = as.character(year)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(year_chr %in% c("2014", "2023")) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, year_chr, rate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = year_chr, values_from = rate, names_prefix = "y") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(y2014), !is.na(y2023), y2014 > 0, y2023 > 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    estimate_discrete = log(y2023 / y2014),
    pct_discrete      = 100 * (y2023 / y2014 - 1)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, estimate_discrete, pct_discrete)

# 2) Smooth 2014 vs 2023 from the response-scale smooth fits
smooth_14_23 <- pred_blue %>%
  dplyr::filter(year_num %in% c(2014, 2023)) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, year_num, fit) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = year_num, values_from = fit, names_prefix = "y") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(y2014), !is.na(y2023), y2014 > 0, y2023 > 0) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    estimate_smooth = log(y2023 / y2014),
    pct_smooth      = 100 * (y2023 / y2014 - 1)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, estimate_smooth, pct_smooth)

# 3) Join + write
densdiffs_smoth <- dplyr::full_join(disc_14_23, smooth_14_23, by = "Species") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(contrast = "2023 - 2014") %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, contrast,
                estimate_discrete, pct_discrete,
                estimate_smooth,   pct_smooth) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(Species)

write.csv(densdiffs_smoth, "densdiffs_smoth.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```




# Look at 2023 densities
```{r}
mydf <- filter(dens, year == "2023", Species %in% c("PSTR", "SSID", "MCAV", "CNAT", "PAST", "SINT", "DLAB"),
               Subregion %in% c("Upper Keys", "Middle Keys", "Lower Keys", "Tortugas", "Marquesas")) %>%
  mutate(Subregion = factor(Subregion, levels = c("Tortugas", "Marquesas", "Lower Keys", "Middle Keys", "Upper Keys")))
mod23 <- glm(n ~ Species * Subregion, family = "poisson", data = mydf)

res <- emmeans(mod23, specs = c("Species", "Subregion"), type = "response")

as_tibble(res) %>%
  filter(!(Species == "DLAB" & Subregion == "Marquesas")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Subregion, y = rate/10)) +
  geom_point(pch = 1) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL/10, ymax = asymp.UCL/10), width = 0.05) +
  facet_grid(Species~., scales = "free") +
  expand_limits(y = 0) +
  labs(y = "Colonies per m2") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


mod24 <- glmer(n ~ Species + (1|Species:Subregion), family = "poisson", data = mydf)
overall <- emmeans(mod24, specs = "Species", type = "response")

write_csv(as_tibble(overall), "test.csv")
resoverall <- as_tibble(overall) %>%
  mutate(rate_site = rate * 4,
         rate_site_upper = asymp.UCL * 4,
         rate_site_lower = asymp.LCL * 4,
         rate_30 = 30/rate_site,
         lower_30 = 30/rate_site_lower,
         upper_30 = 30/rate_site_upper)

write_csv(resoverall, "overall_densities.csv")

ressubregional <- as_tibble(res) %>%
    mutate(perm2 = rate/10,
         pertransect = rate, 
         perdrmsite = rate * 4,
         nsites_for160 = 160/perdrmsite)
write_csv(ressubregional, "subregional_densities.csv")
```
